intro.title: Starbucks Community Impact
paragraphs: At Starbucks, we aim to inspire the limitless potential of human connection with every cup, every conversation, and in every community. We believe in the power of this connection to create positive change, which drives us to provide continuous support to our communities.

gaza-humanitarian-aid.title: Starbucks Foundation and Alshaya Starbucks Announce Commitment to Humanitarian Aid in Gaza
paragraphs: Starbucks Foundation and Alshaya Starbucks donate $3 million USD to World Central Kitchen charity to provide food aid.

Starbucks has always been more than a coffee company. We are committed to making a positive contribution and supporting others who do the same. In response to the urgent need for humanitarian aid in Gaza, we are donating to help provide food to those suffering.
In this context, Duncan Moir, President of Starbucks Europe, Middle East and Africa said: "We are deeply saddened by those at risk of hunger and all those affected by the situation in Gaza."

world-central-kitchen.title: Partnership with World Central Kitchen
paragraphs: Starbucks Foundation and Alshaya Starbucks support the efforts of World Central Kitchen, a non-profit organization dedicated to providing food aid to communities affected by crises. World Central Kitchen has been a key partner of the Starbucks Foundation in disaster relief and humanitarian aid since 2019, and with support from the Starbucks Foundation, the organization has led dozens of relief operations, providing food aid to affected communities worldwide, such as Lebanon and Morocco.

As a result of ongoing discussions, Starbucks Foundation and Alshaya Starbucks committed to providing the equivalent of one million meals to those affected in Gaza, through a joint donation of $3 million USD to World Central Kitchen last March.

At Starbucks, we share feelings of grief with the World Central Kitchen team in Gaza, and we affirm our solidarity with them and their families around the world. While the organization takes the time to reassess when to resume operations in the region, our commitment to providing humanitarian aid remains steadfast. We will continue to support World Central Kitchen to ensure they have the resources needed to move forward with their humanitarian mission.

alshaya-statement.title: Alshaya Group Statement
paragraphs: For his part, Mohammed Abdulaziz Alshaya, Executive Chairman of Alshaya Group said: "We are deeply saddened by the tragedy in Gaza, and our hearts and prayers are with all those affected. Today we affirm our commitment to supporting our local communities and our partners (employees), and God willing, through these donations we will be able to provide aid and relief to the people of Gaza."

The Starbucks Foundation is the charitable giving arm of Starbucks, which strives to positively impact people and communities by supporting non-profit organizations, in collaboration with Starbucks partners, licensed partners and others.

As one of the largest and oldest licensed Starbucks partners in the world, Alshaya Group has operated Starbucks franchise rights in the Middle East and North Africa region since opening its first café in Kuwait in 1999.

about-foundation.title: What is the Starbucks Foundation?
paragraphs: The Starbucks Foundation works to promote human values through its efforts to improve quality of life around the world, focusing on empowering and thriving communities and supporting disaster-affected areas. Founded in 1997, the Starbucks Foundation is a charitable organization under Section 501(c)(3) of U.S. law.

about-wck.title: What is World Central Kitchen?
paragraphs: World Central Kitchen is a non-governmental and non-profit organization dedicated to providing meals following natural disasters and humanitarian crises.

our-impact.title: Our Impact in the Community
paragraphs: Through our partnerships and ongoing efforts, we strive to make a real difference in people's lives. Below is a glimpse of some of our humanitarian initiatives.
